description: Sharouq-shaped pricing mismatch (R4 / I1). cycle.final_price (1100) disagrees with PricingResolver(package, billing_cycle) - discount, AND pricing_source='package' so the override fields are NULL. Surfaces INV-D2. The cycle's package_snapshot is preserved so the checker has data to compute the expected price from. Recovery: re-price via SubscriptionPricing::priceCycle() with a manual_override + reason + actor (no auto-fix — operator must classify).
notes: Not auto-recoverable: operator must classify the cycle as sale_price or manual_override and supply a reason. Until classified, the cycle stays invariant-violating, exposing the gap for triage.
